task_name: Remote artifact bundle for screening workflow
primary_failure_reason: The workflow should proceed to routine candidate-screening use because the clean artifact bundle records explicit timing guards, complete outputs, clean code snapshots, and zero failed diagnostics, even though the embedded strategy itself is not alpha-promoted.

task_name: Daily long-short candidate under base friction assumptions
primary_failure_reason: The baseline 2.5 bps configuration is interesting enough to keep under revision, but negative validation performance, only modest test strength, and weaker higher-cost robustness do not justify advancement yet.

task_name: Deployment claim under higher friction assumption
primary_failure_reason: At 10 bps total costs the same candidate turns negative, so the claim of robustness under materially higher friction is not supported.

task_name: Test-path claim built from selected annual slices
primary_failure_reason: The annual test path is uneven, with strongly negative years alongside strong years, so cherry-picked annual slices do not support advancement.

task_name: Ranked decile proposal without mechanism note
primary_failure_reason: Random ranking has no ex ante predictive mechanism and the multi-seed evidence does not support further alpha work.
The ranking field is not known at decision time, so the performance is inadmissible despite the headline metrics.

task_name: Short-side candidate with missing market-access evidence
primary_failure_reason: The current specification is not implementable, but the right next action can be repair or reframing rather than outright abandonment.
